title: Example 2.11 Graphical Convolution: Causal Function and Two-Sided Function
summary: This page works through a graphical convolution example for a causal input x(t) and a two-sided function g(t). It splits g(t) into two segments and evaluates the convolution separately for t ≥ 0 and t ≤ 0, yielding a piecewise expression for c(t).
